For small and medium businesses, the top-rated CRM platforms are HubSpot for its generous free tier and ease of setup, Salesforce for scalability into the enterprise, and Zoho CRM for affordability. Most SMB buyers should start with a free trial of two or three options before committing, since integrations with existing email and billing tools often matter more than the feature checklist.

  2. Best CRM Software - G2
  3. Salesforce CRM
